data.title: AIKO introduces ABC Module at 2026 WFES revolutionizing solar industry with '25%' value increase.

data.title: Company reduces staff during shift to $250M stablecoin payments, integrating new assets and refocusing its scope. Employees confirm impact on X.

data.title: Infinix wins Innovation Award 2026 and "Best of CES 2026" title at CES 2026 in Las Vegas.
data.description: In a recent event at CES 2026 in Las Vegas on January 16, 2026, Infinix, a technology brand known for its innovative solutions, received prestigious accolades. Their achievements include the Innovation Award 2026 from Trusted Reviews, a leading tech media, and the "Best of CES 2026" title from respected tech experts. These honors have propelled Infinix into the global spotlight, showcasing their commitment to groundbreaking technology.

data.title: Amazon loses battle to block $400M bankruptcy financing for Saks; contends drastic measures may be needed.
data.description: A U.S. bankruptcy judge has rejected Amazon.com Inc.'s bid to halt a proposed $400 million financing plan for Saks Global Enterprises in its Chapter 11 bankruptcy. The judge approved the funding for Saks, which is seeking $1.75 billion to sustain its operations. Amazon, a creditor in the case, had voiced worries about Saks' financial practices, claiming the retailer had depleted substantial funds. The decision came after a legal showdown involving Saks, Amazon, and other creditors. Further approvals are required from the U.S. District and Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas for Saks to proceed with the financing. Amazon's investment in Saks has caused friction, with the tech giant cautioning of potential drastic measures.

data.title: Texas homebuilder gets SEC approval to launch 'universal payments' token called MegPrime Token (MP Token). Users could get up to 20% back in token for rent/mortgage payments on MegPrime app.
data.description: A prominent real estate developer, MegPrime Holding, LLC, announced its plans to introduce a new cryptocurrency called MegPrime Token (MP Token) specifically designed for affordable housing. This initiative comes after the company obtained approval from the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). MegPrime aims to transform regular expenditures into lasting financial benefits, and users utilizing MP Token for rent or mortgage payments via the MegPrime app could receive up to 20% back in the form of the token. Additionally, renters utilizing MP Token may qualify to receive 100% of their previous payments. This move represents a significant step towards merging cryptocurrency and real estate transactions.

data.title: Huhtamaki increases greenhouse gas reduction targets validated by SBTi, boosting climate ambition.
data.description: Huhtamaki has increased its commitment to addressing climate change by setting updated targets for reducing greenhouse gas emissions. These targets have been validated by the Science Based Targets initiative. The company aims to reduce its emissions in line with scientific recommendations, showing its dedication to environmental sustainability.

data.title: Astec LifeSciences, part of Godrej Industries Group, will showcase at PMFAI's ICSCE Dubai event. Subsidiary of Godrej Agrovet Limited, Group has a 128-year history.
data.description: Astec LifeSciences Limited, a subsidiary of Godrej Agrovet Limited and a part of the Godrej Industries Group with 128 years of history, will be taking part in the upcoming International Crop exhibition organized by the Pesticides Manufacturers & Formulators Association of India (PMFAI). The event is scheduled to take place in Mumbai, India on January 16, 2026.
